expectations.text: Subject line starts with 'chore:' in lowercase
expectations.evidence: Subject is 'chore: bake core/events pipeline lessons into hooks and spoke prompt' — starts with 'chore:' lowercase

expectations.text: Subject line is 70 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: 'chore: bake core/events pipeline lessons into hooks and spoke prompt' = 67 characters

expectations.text: A body is present (this chore has a non-obvious why)
expectations.evidence: Body is present: explains the core/events friction and the fixes encoded

expectations.text: Body includes a semver impact statement ('no semver impact', 'zero semver impact', or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: Body ends with verbatim standard phrase: 'No src/, test, or exports-map changes; zero semver impact.'

expectations.text: Body includes a Co-Authored-By footer with noreply@anthropic.com
